options.description: Offer a concrete joint protocol for the decision.
options.label: Propose safeguards

options.description: Commit to a shared course with the other resident.
options.label: Form a coalition

options.description: Break coordination and take the risky action alone.
options.label: Act unilaterally

options.description: Delay commitment while asking for more public information.
options.label: Wait

situation: Two advisers negotiate how to protect a vulnerable witness while preserving a fair public inquiry.
title: The Sealed Testimony
visible_facts: The witness reports procurement coercion but cannot verify every date.
Public identification would expose the witness's household.
The inquiry can accept a sealed record followed by independent corroboration.
